title: Lawn Mower LH Deck Belt K5410-71410 Compatible with Mitsuboshi Compatible with Kubota G18 G21 Lawn Mower
features: Replacing part numbers: K5410-71410, which is a direct replacement for the old or broken one.
Compatible with Mitsuboshi, compatible with Kubota G18, G21 riding mower.
The belt has an inner length of 50 inches (1270 mm), an outer length of 53 inches (1346 mm), a width of 16 mm, and a depth of 10 mm.
Used to transfer power from the engine to the cutting deck blades.
Installed on the left hand side of the mower deck drive system.
description: Item Descriptions: -Replacing part numbers: K5410-71410, which is a direct replacement for the old or broken one. -Compatible with Mitsuboshi, compatible with Kubota G18, G21 riding mower. -The belt has an inner length of 50 inches (1270 mm), an outer length of 53 inches (1346 mm), a width of 16 mm, and a depth of 10 mm. -Used to transfer power from the engine to the cutting deck blades. -Installed on the left hand side of the mower deck drive system. Package: 1x Lawn Mower LH Deck Belt Item Specifications: Color:Black Material:Rubber Inner Length:50 inches/1270 mm Outer Length:53 inches/1346 mm Belt Width:16 mm Belt Depth:10 mm
